chunks.text: Student Awards - EECS at Berkeley 2022 Samuel Silver Scholarship winner Lucas Spangher performing at the EECS Student Awards ceremony EECS Student Awards Each year the EECS Student Awards Committee selects winners for each of our department awards, many based on nominations gathered from EECS students, faculty and staff. Submit a Nomination The 2025-26 Student Award Nomination Period is Open We invite nominations from EECS faculty, students, and staff for the EECS student awards. OGSI/EECS Outstanding TA Awards : Call for nominations open on Monday, 2/9/26; The deadline is 2/18/26 . All other Department awards : Call for nominations will open on 2/20/26; The deadline is 3/5/26 . Submit your nominations here . Nominate deserving students for this year’s student awards Nomination Procedure Compose a letter (approximately 1 page) for each nominee explaining your reason for recommending the student. Nominators should specifically address how the nominee meets the award criteria. Attach any relevant materials that will assist the Student Awards Committee in making their decision, such as publications, CVs, and additional letters of nomination. In addition to a letter, you may request the nominee to upload their resume and transcript to the nomination. Faculty support letters are highly recommended. The committee may seek additional information about the most promising nominees. Previous award recipients are ineligible to receive the same award again but may be recommended for any remaining awards. Nominators are encouraged to refer to the description of each award , which includes a list of previous awardees. Self-nominations with

committee may seek additional information about the most promising nominees. Previous award recipients are ineligible to receive the same award again but may be recommended for any remaining awards. Nominators are encouraged to refer to the description of each award , which includes a list of previous awardees. Self-nominations with no nomination letter or supporting documentation are discouraged. List of Awards The following awards recognize and honor the ability and character of our students. Each award page includes a list of past awardees and a description of the award’s history and purpose. Demetri Angelakos Memorial Achievement Award Timothy B. Campbell Innovation Award Departmental Citation Warren Y. Dere Design Award EECS Outstanding TA Awards Art and Mary Fong Undergraduate Scholarship Jim and Donna Gray Endowment Award Arthur M. Hopkin Award Eli Jury Award Eugene L. Lawler Prize Tong Leong Lim Pre-Doctoral Prize C.V. & Daulat Ramamoorthy Distinguished Research Award Sevin Rosen Funds Award for Innovation David J. Sakrison Memorial Prize Samuel Silver Memorial Scholarship Award Ross N.
